summary: Formation & Sensibilisation Module (ARS 1000) - Complete Testing. All 19 backend API tests PASSED. All 5 frontend pages verified working with proper UI elements and integrations.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend formation.py is well-structured with 12 mandatory ARS 1000 themes pre-defined
Theme pre-fill works correctly when creating sessions - title, clause, public_cible, description auto-populated
PDF generation for PV and Attestations uses reportlab with proper styling
Excel export uses openpyxl with two sheets: Sessions and Listes de presence
Dashboard correctly computes theme coverage (complete/planifie/non_planifie) and alerts
Member history search uses MongoDB aggregation pipeline with $unwind
Frontend components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
QuickActionsPanel correctly includes 'Formation' section with 5 items (Dashboard, Programme, Sessions, PV & Presence, Attestations)
Color coding implemented: Green=Complete, Orange=Planifie, Red=Non planifie/En retard
seed_data_creation: Created multiple programmes and sessions during testing. Integration test created programme with SST session and 2 participants.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Formation module fully tested. Multiple programmes and sessions exist in DB. 12 mandatory themes: POL_DURABILITE, DROITS_HOMME, DISCRIMINATION, TRAVAIL_ENFANTS, EGALITE_GENRE, SST, DECHETS_ECOSYSTEMES, TRACABILITE_BPA, RESILIENCE_CLIMAT, LIBERTE_ASSOCIATION, PROTECTION_EAU, AGROCHIMIQUES. Rate limiter may block after 30 attempts - restart backend to clear.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/formation/themes: PASSED - Returns 12 mandatory ARS 1000 themes with code, titre, clause, description, public_cible
backend_endpoints.POST /api/formation/programmes: PASSED - Creates programme with 12 pre-filled themes (statut=planifie, sessions_count=0, participants_count=0)
backend_endpoints.POST /api/formation/sessions: PASSED - Creates session with theme data pre-filled (titre, clause, public_cible, contenu)
backend_endpoints.GET /api/formation/sessions: PASSED - Returns sessions with stats (total, planifiees, completees, en_retard, total_participants)
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/formation/sessions/{id}: PASSED - Updates session status (completee updates programme theme stats)
backend_endpoints.GET /api/formation/sessions/{id}/pv/pdf: PASSED - Generates PV PDF with session info and presence list
backend_endpoints.GET /api/formation/dashboard: PASSED - Returns KPIs, theme_coverage (12 themes), alertes
backend_endpoints.GET /api/formation/export/excel: PASSED - Exports all data as Excel (2 sheets)

frontend_pages./cooperative/formation: PASSED - Dashboard with KPIs (Sessions, Completees, Planifiees, En retard, Participants, PV generes, Couverture), alerts, theme coverage (12 themes), quick actions
frontend_pages./cooperative/formation/programme: PASSED - Programme page with progress bar and 12 theme cards (shows empty state if no programme)
frontend_pages./cooperative/formation/sessions: PASSED - Sessions list with filters (search, statut, theme), create modal with theme pre-fill
frontend_pages./cooperative/formation/pv: PASSED - PV & Presence page with session selector, session info, participants table, download PV button, add participant modal
frontend_pages./cooperative/formation/attestations: PASSED - Attestations page with member search, completed sessions list with expandable participant attestations

frontend_interactions.Dashboard navigation buttons: PASSED - Programme, Sessions, PV & Presence, Attestations all navigate correctly
frontend_interactions.Create session modal: PASSED - Theme select pre-fills titre, clause, public_cible, contenu
frontend_interactions.Session status badges: PASSED - Green=Completee, Red=En retard, color coding works
frontend_interactions.PV download: PASSED - Downloads PDF with session info and presence list
frontend_interactions.Add participant modal: PASSED - Form with nom, prenom, role, telephone, signature checkbox
frontend_interactions.QuickActionsPanel: PASSED - Contains 'Formation' section with 5 items (Dashboard, Programme, Sessions, PV & Presence, Attestations)
